## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] If updating prices: `collected_at` was bumped to today
- [ ] If adding a new provider: an entry exists in `src/data/providers.json`
- [ ] Source URL(s) referenced in the data are public and load
- [ ] If UI change: screenshot below
